question_head: Rate your agreement with the following statement.
SSSQ11: I was committed to attaining my performance goals.
SSSQ12: I wanted to succeed on the task.
SSSQ13: I was motivated to do the task.
SSSQ14: I was trying to figure myself out.
SSSQ17: I was confident about my abilities.
SSSQ19: I was worried about what other people think of me.
SSSQ20: I felt concerned about the impression I am making.
SSSQ21: I expected to perform proficiently on this task.
SSSQ22: Generally, I felt in control of things.
SSSQ23: I thought about how others have done on this task.
SSSQ24: I thought about how I would feel if I were told how I performed.
debrief: Thank you for completing the Short Stress State Questionnaire.
